Summarise a fitted GH model

Source: R/generics.R
summary.genhaz_fit.Rd

Returns a "summary.genhaz_fit" object containing model metadata and a covariate coefficient table with Wald confidence intervals and exponentiated estimates.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'genhaz_fit'
summary(object, alpha = 0.05, ...)

Arguments

object

A "genhaz_fit" object from fit_genhaz().

alpha

Significance level for confidence intervals. Default 0.05.

...

Currently unused.

Value

An object of class "summary.genhaz_fit" (printed by print.summary.genhaz_fit()).

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
summary(fit)
} # }
